mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gra_project.collection_tasks (task_name, user_id, start_time, end_time, station_list, element_list, task_description, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{userId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{stationList, typeHandler=com.example.backend.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, #{elementList, typeHandler=com.example.backend.config.StringArrayTypeHandler}, #{taskDescription}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE gra_project.collection_tasks SET task_name = #{taskName}, user_id = #{userId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, station_list = #{stationList, typeHandler=com.example.backend.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, element_list = #{elementList, typeHandler=com.example.backend.config.StringArrayTypeHandler}, task_description = #{taskDescription}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM gra_project.collection_tasks WHERE task_id = #{taskId})
